heading: Rulemaking by Federal Trade Commission
label: 7607 Rulemaking by Federal Trade Commission
text: The Federal Trade Commission shall prescribe rules pursuant to to carry out this chapter. Rules so prescribed shall be exempt from the requirements of the Magnuson-Moss Warranty—Federal Trade Commission Improvement Act ( et seq.). Any such regulations shall be issued in accordance with . The first rules under this section shall take effect not later than 180 days after the effective date of this chapter.section 57a of this title15 U.S.C. 2301section 553 of title 5
